'''6Y-2KPR''' was a [[Color/Legends|green]]-domed [[KPR security droid/Legends|KPR security droid]] manufactured by [[Lerrimore Droids]].<ref name="VG" /> In [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]],<ref name="TEC">''[[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|The Essential Chronology]] establishes that the event of {{Film|IV}} take place in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]].</ref> this droid was in the possession of [[Nebit/Legends|Nebit's]] [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] [[Nebit's tribe/Legends|tribe]] and it was stored on the same [[Sandcrawler/Legends|sandcrawler]] that held [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] captive after they escaped from the [[Tantive IV/Legends|''Tantive IV'']]. When the sandcrawler arrived at [[Owen Lars/Legends|Owen Lars']] [[Lars homestead/Legends|moisture farm]], the Jawas lined up several droids to sell, including R2-D2 and C-3PO. 6Y-2KPR was not one of the [[Droid/Legends|droids]] selected to be shown.<ref name="VG" />
